---
name: Parent Issue Template 
about: Use this template to create a parent issue that will be used to track multiple child issues.
title: "[SCOPE]: <title>"
assignees: Synogun
---

## Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the parent issue is about. -->

>

## Workload
<!-- List of child issues that will be created to complete the parent issue. -->

- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2
- [ ] Task 3

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Define the criteria that must be met for this parent issue to be considered complete. -->

- [ ] All child issues are completed and closed.
- [ ] All necessary documentation is updated.
